rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Friday, April 24, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO's Motion to Compel Responses to Form Interrogatories, set one, and for monetary sanctions is GRANTED. Alkhasov ordered to produce responses to discovery within ten days of notice of entry of order without objections. Sanctions of $1,535 GRANTED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. To Second Amended Cross-Complaint Of Edward Alkhasov
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Friday, April 24, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO's Demurrer to the First Cause of Action for breach of contract is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Wells Fargo's Demurrer to the Second Cause of Action for breach of lease is sustained with leave to amend. Alkhasov to address the apparent contradiction between the lease and the pleadings as to the validity of the lease and the alter-ego relationships between named Cross-Defendants, and to plead his performance of the lease. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Edward Alkhasovs Second Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Friday, April 24, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO's Motion to Strike is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Request to strike the first cause of action is DENIED as moot. Request to strike punitive damages is GRANTED because Civil Code Section 3294 only allows punitive damages that does not arise from a contract. Request to strike attorney's fees request is GRANTED because Alkhasov is appearing in pro per and is not an attorney. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PYRAMID DESIGN(SERIES D) LLC ET AL VS. GERALD R. LOWE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Friday, April 24, 2015, line 2. Cross-Defendant Pyramid Design (Series D) LLC et al.'s Demurrer to Cross-Complaint is CONTINUED to May 27, 2015 to allow moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6B. Moving Party failed to provide courtesy copy of the moving papers and the operative complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Friday, April 24, 2015, line 3. Defendants' Motion for Attorney's fees and costs is GRANTED in amount of $6,932.00.= (501/REQ)
